articles.title: Suspect killed after opening fire on Secret Service near White House
articles.summary: Officials say a suspect approached a checkpoint near the building and opened fire, and that a bystander was wounded.

articles.title: Large-scale Russian attack on Ukraine leaves four dead and dozens injured
articles.summary: The Oreshnik missile, which reportedly travels over 10 times the speed of sound, was used, Russia has confirmed.

articles.title: BBC at the site of China's worst mining disaster in more than a decade
articles.summary: At least 82 people have been killed after a gas explosion at the Liushenyu mine in China.

articles.title: Blast targeting train kills at least 20 in Pakistan
articles.summary: Officials say the train had been transporting military personnel home for Eid when it was attacked by armed separatists.

articles.title: Man killed in shark attack off Australia's north-east coast
articles.summary: The 39-year-old was fatally injured while swimming out at a shoal off the Cassowary Coast in Queensland.

articles.title: California declares emergency as fire crews race to contain toxic leak
articles.summary: Thousands have been evacuated as officials warn a tank containing about 7,000 gallons of methyl methacrylate could explode.

articles.title: At least 82 killed in Chinese coal mine explosion
articles.summary: The blast in Shanxi province constitutes the country's worst mining disaster in 16 years.

articles.title: Red Cross volunteers die from suspected Ebola in DR Congo
articles.summary: They are thought to have caught the virus before the outbreak was identified, the Red Cross says.

articles.title: French mum and partner held until trial after sons abandoned by road in Portugal
articles.summary: The couple, who allegedly left the woman's sons on a roadside in southern Portugal, will remain in custody.

articles.title: F1 great Prost 'injured as masked gang raid home'
articles.summary: Four-time Formula 1 world champion Alain Prost was injured when a masked gang raided his home near Geneva, Swiss media reports.
